d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d
d d!d"d#d
d$d%d&d
d'd(d)d*d+d,d-d.d/d0d1d2d3d4d
d5d6d7d8d9d:d

dldmdndodpdqdrdsdtdudvdwdxdydzd{d|dkd~dOd
SingleByteCharSetModel
windows-1250Z	Hungariang
?TuP
